title: GitHub PRs
command: gh pr list --state all --limit 20 --json number,title,state,isDraft,url 2>/dev/null | jq '[.[] | {icon: "●",iconColor: (if .state == "MERGED" then "#a371f7" elif .state == "CLOSED" then "#cc4444" elif .isDraft then "#888888" else "#22cc22" end),title: "#\(.number) \(.title)",description: .state,action: { shell: "open \(.url) >/dev/null 2>&1 || xdg-open \(.url) >/dev/null 2>&1" }}]'
emptyText: No PRs (or gh / jq not installed)
